response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely matching the role's stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalability, and developer tooling aligns well with the responsibilities of designing end-to-end features and optimizing performance. Leadership in open-source projects and workshops further highlights his technical depth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven impact in scaling systems and AI-agent development
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though Nest.js is Node.js-based)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not in the target stack
German language skills are basic (minor for a global team)
